Kadir Has University

KHAS Economy

Kadir Has University Department of Economics aims to provide students with a solid theoretical background and analytical thinking skills. The academic staff carries out studies at national and international level. The department offers in-depth knowledge in the field of economics with an interdisciplinary approach.
